title: Create a new release
body:
Hi, with the recent change of adding demuxing to `exec_run`, it'd be very nice to have a new release.

https://github.com/containers/podman-py/commit/05d1e7cb89b45fb80a71320de6f011e29022b5a7

comments.body:
Should be a podman-py 5.2 release soon.

@umohnani8 @jwhonce @TomSweeneyRedHat WDYT?
@rhatdan sounds like an excellent plan.  @mheon want to spin up a RUN card to make sure we don't miss it?  Or is it already there.
I believe @inknos was planning one for around the time Podman 5.2 came out?
yup, I'll keep it in sync with Podman 5.2
